metrics.name: academorix.user.provisioned.total
metrics.description: source: invitation / self_registration / admin_created / sso_grant / import.

metrics.name: academorix.user.provision.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end provisioning latency (create Identity + Profile + User + TenantMember + fire events). P95 target < 500ms; P99 < 2s.

metrics.name: academorix.user.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of Users per status. Populated hourly by a metrics-collector task.

metrics.name: academorix.user.tenant_member.count
metrics.description: Global count of TenantMember rows. Feeds the multi-tenant-usage dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.user.tenant_switch.total
metrics.description: How often users switch active tenant via `/me/tenants/{tenant}/switch`.

metrics.name: academorix.user.me_request.duration_ms
metrics.description: `GET /api/v1/me` latency. P99 target < 100ms because the SPA blocks on it for the initial paint.

metrics.name: academorix.user.last_active_flush.duration_ms
metrics.description: UpdateLastActiveJob flush latency. Sustained > 5s indicates the buffer is oversized.

metrics.name: academorix.user.purge_pending.count
metrics.description: Users past their erasure hold window that haven't been hard-deleted yet. Feeds the `user-purge-queue-drained` health probe.
